inner.text: Resize a grid with a custom copy function. Useful for when the terminal is resized and/or when
a SIGWINCH is caught. A user may wish not to begin copying from the top left of the screen moving
left-to-right. For this reason we allow the user to define their own copy routine and pass it to
this function as a function pointer.
the grid to be resized
the current (old) number of rows
the current (old) number of columns
the number of rows in the resized grid
the number of columns in the resized grid
a function pointer to a user-defined function to perform the array copying
